nbaNews.title: J. Cole ends stint with Chinese pro hoops team
nbaNews.summary: Rap megastar J. Cole said Tuesday that his time playing professional basketball in China has come to an end after one game.

nbaNews.title: Bronny's Nike 'B9' logo trademark filing denied
nbaNews.summary: Nike's trademark filing for Lakers guard Bronny James' "B9" logo has been refused because of a "likelihood of confusion" with an already-registered mark.
